title: artifact-plan-approval
description: Machine-written record that a rostered reviewer approved the plan. Role-CONSISTENCY on attribution, not authentication: reviewer must be in team.yaml reviewers and normalize (agent suffix stripped) to a different user than the author unless allow_self_review. plan_hash pins the NORMALIZED plan dir (frontmatter stripped from every file, plan.md '## Phases' section stripped) — the two regions the cook workflow legitimately mutates after approval are exempt, any body edit invalidates the approval. Written ONLY via harness/scripts/plan_approval.py to plans/<plan>/artifacts/plan-approval.json.

plan.description: Plan dir name the approval covers

plan_hash.description: sha256-12hex over the normalized plan dir (plan.md + phase-*.md sorted by name; frontmatter stripped everywhere, '## Phases' stripped from plan.md only)

file_hashes.description: Per-file normalized hashes so a drift block can name exactly which file changed

author.description: Plan author attribution (trace event, plan.md frontmatter, or explicit --author)

reviewer.description: resolve_actor() of whoever ran plan_approval.py — attribution, spoofable by design
